query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='play_seconds_total' AND JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name')!='' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, library, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'library') AS library, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='library_storage_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='library_storage_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, library, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time, library ORDER BY time

SELECT time, library, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'library') AS library, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='library_duration_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='library_duration_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, library, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time, library ORDER BY time

SELECT time, library_type, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'library_type') AS library_type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='plays_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='plays_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, library_type, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time, library_type ORDER BY time

SELECT time, stream_type, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'stream_type') AS stream_type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='play_seconds_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='play_seconds_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, stream_type, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time, stream_type ORDER BY time

SELECT time, device_type, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device_type') AS device_type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='play_seconds_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='play_seconds_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device_type, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time, device_type ORDER BY time

SELECT time, stream_resolution, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'stream_resolution') AS stream_resolution, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='play_seconds_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='play_seconds_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, stream_resolution, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time, stream_resolution ORDER BY time

SELECT user, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'user') AS user, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='play_seconds_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='play_seconds_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY fp, user, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY user ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT title, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'title') AS title, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='plays_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='plays_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY fp, title, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY title ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Active play time rate by user

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, user, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, user, cluster, server_type, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'user') AS user, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='play_seconds_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='play_seconds_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, user, cluster, server_type)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time, user ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, cluster, server_type, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='estimated_transmit_bytes_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='estimated_transmit_bytes_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster, server_type)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='host_cpu_util' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='host_cpu_util' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='host_mem_util' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='host_mem_util' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='library_storage_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='library_storage_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='plays_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='plays_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT user, title, stream_type, stream_resolution, device_type, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'user') AS user, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'title') AS title, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'stream_type') AS stream_type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'stream_resolution') AS stream_resolution, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device_type') AS device_type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'server_type') AS server_type, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='play_seconds_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='play_seconds_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY fp, user, title, stream_type, stream_resolution, device_type, cluster, server_type) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) AND server_type='plex' GROUP BY user, title, stream_type, stream_resolution, device_type ORDER BY value DESC
